definition: MRKR de-identified patient identifier.
MRKR knee-level identifier constructed as MRKR_<empi_anon>_<side>.
Target knee side: L or R.
Age at landmark radiograph.
1 for female, 0 for male.
Earliest side-specific radiograph date with inferred KL and no arthroplasty hardware.
Radiograph closest to 24 months after baseline within the 18-36 month window.
Observed months between baseline and landmark radiographs.
Nearest 0-10 knee pain score within 180 days of baseline. Bilateral scores are mapped to both knees.
Nearest 0-10 knee pain score within 180 days of landmark.
pain_24 minus pain_0.
Landmark pain severity group: 0, 1-3, 4-6, or 7-10.
Baseline side-specific MRKR model-inferred Kellgren-Lawrence grade.
Landmark side-specific MRKR model-inferred Kellgren-Lawrence grade.
kl_24 minus kl_0.
Primary knee-side outcome: arthroplasty hardware first observed on target knee after landmark.
Months from landmark to hardware event or last target-knee radiograph.
Sensitivity patient-level outcome: knee arthroplasty CPT code after landmark, not side-specific.
Sensitivity patient-level outcome: CPT 27447 after landmark, not side-specific.
Months from landmark to first knee arthroplasty CPT event or last CPT record.
Complete-case flag for Model F transport variables and positive hardware follow-up time.
